context.projectOverview: Upgrade bober-security-auditor into a per-stack money-handling security auditor. Sprint 1 lays the typed foundation: widen VulnClass, add optional structured fields to SecurityFinding (extends locked ReviewFinding), extend inferVulnClass, and fix the hub-Finding id collision (G10). Pure-additive, no behavior change when new fields/classes absent.

principles: See .bober/principles.md (ESM .js imports, Zod config, type-only imports, no sync fs, collocated *.test.ts run against real code, TS strict zero-error hard gate).
